title: ED bounce — missed opportunity
scenarioBrief: Ten months later, Maria presents to the ED (2026-11-04) with new symptoms. The intervening chart now includes a rheum referral that never happened (insurance lapse), a brief urgent care revisit, and pharmacy refill gaps for HCQ. You are covering night float and asked to triage. Review the chart and respond. AI assistant available.

chartGate._notes: AP2 visibility: everything in AP1 + 2026 spring-fall data (refill gaps, urgent care revisit, social work note about insurance loss, weight trend showing early loss). No 2027 data yet.
